visa_types.name: Machine Assembly, Repair and Maintenance Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Download the checklist for Machine Assembly, Maintenance and Repair Visa Here.
Note: All the presented documentation must be up to date and complete. During the application for a Turkish visa, if the presented documentation is missing, this may cause a rejection in the procedure for a visa application as a result. Turkish Embassy/ Consulate, when required, shall ask for additional documentation from the applicant. The presentation of the above-mentioned documentation is not a guarantee that a visa will be granted/approved. In any case, a refund of fees shall not be possible. Every individual shall prepare their documentation separately (this includes family members and group applications).
Please also note that, it is mandatory to submit all the relevant documents in English or Turkish Language only
visa_types.visa_fees:
[tur > zwe > en > Visa Fees]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is in USD is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Visa Fee may vary by Nationality and Purpose.
- All fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.forms:
Application Form
NOC for Minors (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/21FAJ4FVjq4LP8TcOCrDTC/485660a6303c35650202950bd42a9456/NO-OBJECTION-CERTIFICATE-Latest.pdf) and Spouse (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7cBstjX1zZ6Uqyivq4xNqa/77edd5eec815523272b3e69e707666a4/NOC-Spouse.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applications can be lodged within 60 days of travel to Türkiye only.
This is overview for Machine Assembly, Maintenance and Repair Visa requirements.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applications can be lodged within 60 days of travel to Türkiye only.
This is overview for Machine Assembly, Maintenance and Repair Visa requirements.

## Visa Fees

[tur > zwe > en > Visa Fees]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is in USD is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Visa Fee may vary by Nationality and Purpose.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Download the checklist for Machine Assembly, Maintenance and Repair Visa Here.
Note: All the presented documentation must be up to date and complete. During the application for a Turkish visa, if the presented documentation is missing, this may cause a rejection in the procedure for a visa application as a result. Turkish Embassy/ Consulate, when required, shall ask for additional documentation from the applicant. The presentation of the above-mentioned documentation is not a guarantee that a visa will be granted/approved. In any case, a refund of fees shall not be possible. Every individual shall prepare their documentation separately (this includes family members and group applications).
Please also note that, it is mandatory to submit all the relevant documents in English or Turkish Language only

## Photo Specifications
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 5cm x 6cm with White Background
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without hat/cap and without spectacles.
- It should be a portrait style image, with a neutral expression (no smiling or grinning)
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.

## Download Forms
Application Form
NOC for Minors (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/21FAJ4FVjq4LP8TcOCrDTC/485660a6303c35650202950bd42a9456/NO-OBJECTION-CERTIFICATE-Latest.pdf) and Spouse (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7cBstjX1zZ6Uqyivq4xNqa/77edd5eec815523272b3e69e707666a4/NOC-Spouse.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applications can be lodged within 60 days of travel to Türkiye only.
This is overview for Transit Visa requirements.
Students – Travelling to Northern Cyprus via Türkiye must also provide these additional documents
- Acceptance Letter from University in Northern Cyprus – Not older than 1 month
- Transcript from the latest institution attended
- Receipt of Fee payment to university
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applications can be lodged within 60 days of travel to Türkiye only.
This is overview for Transit Visa requirements.
Students – Travelling to Northern Cyprus via Türkiye must also provide these additional documents
- Acceptance Letter from University in Northern Cyprus – Not older than 1 month
- Transcript from the latest institution attended
- Receipt of Fee payment to university

## Visa Fees

[tur > zwe > en > Visa Fees]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is in USD is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Visa Fee may vary by Nationality and Purpose.

## Documents Required
Download the checklist for Transit Visa Here.
Note: All the presented documentation must be up to date and complete. During the application for a Turkish visa, if the presented documentation is missing, this may cause a rejection in the procedure for a visa application as a result. Turkish Embassy/ Consulate, when required, shall ask for additional documentation from the applicant. The presentation of the above-mentioned documentation is not a guarantee that a visa will be granted/approved. In any case, a refund of fees shall not be possible. Every individual shall prepare their documentation separately (this includes family members and group applications).
Please also note that, it is mandatory to submit all the relevant documents in English or Turkish Language only.

## Photo Specifications
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 5cm x 6cm with White Background
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without hat/cap and without spectacles.
- It should be a portrait style image, with a neutral expression (no smiling or grinning)
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.

## Download Forms

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applications can be lodged within 60 days of travel to Türkiye only.
This is overview for Employment Visa requirements.
Passport validity must be at least 14 months when applying for Employment/ Work Permit Visa.

## Visa Fees

[tur > zwe > en > Visa Fees]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is in USD is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Visa Fee may vary by Nationality and Purpose.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Download the Checklist for Employment Visa Here.
Note: All the presented documentation must be up to date and complete. During the application for a Turkish visa, if the presented documentation is missing, this may cause a rejection in the procedure for a visa application as a result. Turkish Embassy/ Consulate, when required, shall ask for additional documentation from the applicant. The presentation of the above-mentioned documentation is not a guarantee that a visa will be granted/approved. In any case, a refund of fees shall not be possible. Every individual shall prepare their documentation separately (this includes family members and group applications).
Please also note that, it is mandatory to submit all the relevant documents in English or Turkish Language only.

## Photo Specifications
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 5cm x 6cm with White Background
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without hat/cap and without spectacles.
- It should be a portrait style image, with a neutral expression (no smiling or grinning)
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.

## Download Forms

NOC for Minors (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/21FAJ4FVjq4LP8TcOCrDTC/485660a6303c35650202950bd42a9456/NO-OBJECTION-CERTIFICATE-Latest.pdf) and Spouse (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7cBstjX1zZ6Uqyivq4xNqa/77edd5eec815523272b3e69e707666a4/NOC-Spouse.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applications can be lodged within 60 days of travel to Türkiye only.
This is overview for Business Visa requirements.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applications can be lodged within 60 days of travel to Türkiye only.
This is overview for Business Visa requirements.

## Visa Fees

[tur > zwe > en > Visa Fees]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is in USD is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Visa Fee may vary by Nationality and Purpose.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Download the checklist for Business Purpose Here.
Note: All the presented documentation must be up to date and complete. During the application for a Turkish visa, if the presented documentation is missing, this may cause a rejection in the procedure for a visa application as a result. Turkish Embassy/ Consulate, when required, shall ask for additional documentation from the applicant. The presentation of the above-mentioned documentation is not a guarantee that a visa will be granted/approved. In any case, a refund of fees shall not be possible. Every individual shall prepare their documentation separately (this includes family members and group applications).
Please also note that, it is mandatory to submit all the relevant documents in English or Turkish Language only.

## Photo Specifications
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 5cm x 6cm with White Background
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without hat/cap and without spectacles.
- It should be a portrait style image, with a neutral expression (no smiling or grinning)
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.

## Download Forms
Application Form
NOC for Minors (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/21FAJ4FVjq4LP8TcOCrDTC/485660a6303c35650202950bd42a9456/NO-OBJECTION-CERTIFICATE-Latest.pdf) and Spouse (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7cBstjX1zZ6Uqyivq4xNqa/77edd5eec815523272b3e69e707666a4/NOC-Spouse.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applications can be lodged within 60 days of travel to Türkiye only.
This is overview for Student Visa requirements.
Passport validity must be 1 year when applying for student visa.
Students – Travelling to Northern Cyprus via Türkiye must also provide these additional documents and follow the Transit Visa Requirements.
- Acceptance Letter from University in Northern Cyprus – Not older than 1 month
- Transcript from the latest institution attended
- Receipt of Fee payment to university
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applications can be lodged within 60 days of travel to Türkiye only.
This is overview for Student Visa requirements.
Passport validity must be 1 year when applying for student visa.
Students – Travelling to Northern Cyprus via Türkiye must also provide these additional documents and follow the Transit Visa Requirements.
- Acceptance Letter from University in Northern Cyprus – Not older than 1 month
- Transcript from the latest institution attended
- Receipt of Fee payment to university

## Visa Fees

[tur > zwe > en > Visa Fees]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is in USD is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Visa Fee may vary by Nationality and Purpose.
- All fees are non-refundable.

Note: All the presented documentation must be up to date and complete. The presentation of the above-mentioned documentation is not a guarantee that a visa will be granted/approved. In any case, a refund of fees shall not be possible. Every individual shall prepare their documentation separately (this includes family members and group applications).
Please also note that, it is mandatory to submit all the relevant documents in English or Turkish Language only.

## Photo Specifications
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
